name: California Skillet
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the meat and onion. Remove from the pan and set aside.
2. Add chili powder to the same skillet and cook for 30 seconds.
3. Pour in water, tomato soup, corn, Worcestershire sauce, macaroni, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
4. Return the meat and onion to the skillet. Cover and simmer on low heat for 20-30 minutes or until the macaroni is tender.
5. Uncover the pan and sprinkle with cheese. Stir well. Continue cooking until the cheese melts.
